The '''''Port-Esta Queen''''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] and trading [[Starship/Legends|ship]] that operated out of [[Port-Esta]] on [[Vestar/Legends|Vestar]]. Her [[Captain/Legends|captain]] spoke with [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] about [[Abal Karda]]. [[Boog]] served aboard the ''Port-Esta Queen''.

While the ship was not licensed to carry passengers, the crew were willing to bend the rules if the price was deemed worthy, and hence smuggled the fugitive [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] Karda off Vestar to [[Starstation 12]] in return for a bribe of [[Icarii]] jewels. When Fett approached the crew in pursuit of Karda, he killed Boog when the smuggler attempted to drop a crate of [[kneeb]]s on top of him, and subsequently interrogated the captain for clues about Karda's trail.

Shortly after Fett departed, the captain was captured by [[Nevo]] and his motley crew of [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]], themselves contracted to follow Fett to Karda, who tortured and killed the smuggler for information.

==Appearances==
*[[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 1|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 1]] {{1st}}
*[[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 2|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 2]]
